title: Drip Irrigation Subsidy — iKhedut
content: Under the iKhedut portal, Gujarat farmers can avail subsidy on drip irrigation systems. Small and marginal farmers receive up to 75% subsidy on installation cost. Other farmers receive 55% subsidy. Maximum subsidy limit: ₹1,40,000 per hectare. Application: ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in. Required documents: 7/12 land record, Aadhar card, bank passbook. Helpline: 1800-233-3155.
content_gu: iKhedut પોર્ટલ હેઠળ, ગુજરાતના ખેડૂતો ટપક સિંચાઈ પ્રણાલી પર સબ્સિડી મેળવી શકે છે. નાના અને સીમાંત ખેડૂતોને સ્થાપના ખર્ચ પર 75% સુધી સબ્સિડી મળે છે. અન્ય ખેડૂતોને 55% સબ્સિડી મળે છે. મહત્તમ સબ્સિડી મર્યાદા: ₹1,40,000 પ્રતિ હેક્ટર. અરજી: ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in. જરૂરી દસ્તાવેજો: 7/12 જમીન રેકોર્ડ, આધાર કાર્ડ, બેંક પાસબુક. હેલ્પલાઇન: 1800-233-3155.

title: Sprinkler Irrigation Subsidy — iKhedut
content: Gujarat government provides subsidy on sprinkler irrigation under the iKhedut portal. Small and marginal farmers: 75% subsidy. General farmers: 55% subsidy. Maximum benefit: ₹80,000 per hectare. Applicable for all kharif and rabi crops. Apply online at ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in or nearest Krishi Vigyan Kendra.
content_gu: ગુજરાત સરકાર iKhedut પોર્ટલ હેઠળ ફુવારા સિંચાઈ પર સબ્સિડી આપે છે. નાના અને સીમાંત ખેડૂતો: 75% સબ્સિડી. સામાન્ય ખેડૂતો: 55% સબ્સિડી. મહત્તમ લાભ: ₹80,000 પ્રતિ હેક્ટર. ખરીફ અને રવિ પાક માટે લાગુ. ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in પર ઓનલાઈન અરજી કરો.

title: Tractor Purchase Subsidy — iKhedut
content: Gujarat farmers can apply for tractor purchase subsidy under iKhedut. Subsidy amount: ₹45,000 for tractors up to 35 HP for SC/ST/small/marginal farmers. General category: ₹25,000. Eligibility: Own agricultural land, valid driving licence, no previous tractor subsidy in last 10 years. Documents: 7/12, caste certificate (if SC/ST), income certificate.
content_gu: ગુજરાતના ખેડૂતો iKhedut હેઠળ ટ્રેક્ટર ખરીદી સબ્સિડી માટે અરજી કરી શકે છે. સબ્સિડી રકમ: SC/ST/નાના/સીમાંત ખેડૂતો માટે 35 HP સુધીના ટ્રેક્ટર પર ₹45,000. સામાન્ય શ્રેણી: ₹25,000. પાત્રતા: કૃષિ જમીન, માન્ય ડ્રાઇવિંગ લાઇસન્સ, છેલ્લા 10 વર્ષમાં અગાઉ ટ્રેક્ટર સબ્સિડી ન મળી હોય.

title: Soil Health Card Scheme — Gujarat
content: Under the Soil Health Card scheme, Gujarat farmers receive a card showing their soil's nutrient status and recommendations for appropriate doses of nutrients for each crop. Free soil testing available at Agriculture Department offices across all 33 districts. Contact Gujarat Agriculture Helpline: 1800-180-1551. Farmers can check their card status at soilhealth.dac.gov.in.
content_gu: સોઇલ હેલ્થ કાર્ડ યોજના હેઠળ, ગુજરાતના ખેડૂતોને તેમની જમીનની પોષક સ્થિતિ અને દરેક પાક માટે પોષક તત્ત્વોના યોગ્ય ડોઝ માટે ભલામણ દર્શાવતું કાર્ડ મળે છે. 33 જિલ્લાઓ ભર કૃષિ વિભાગ કચેરીઓ ખાતે મફત જમીન પરીક્ષણ ઉપલબ્ધ. ગુજરાત કૃષિ હેલ્પલાઇન: 1800-180-1551.

title: Groundnut Seed Subsidy — Gujarat Agriculture Dept
content: Gujarat Agriculture Department provides certified groundnut (mungfali) seed at subsidised rates for Kharif season. Subsidy: up to ₹1,000 per quintal on certified seed. Priority given to Saurashtra region farmers (Rajkot, Junagadh, Amreli, Bhavnagar districts) where groundnut is the primary kharif crop. Applications accepted through iKhedut portal from April to June each year.
content_gu: ગુજરાત કૃષિ વિભાગ ખરીફ સિઝન માટે સબ્સિડી દરે પ્રમાણિત મગફળી બિયારણ પૂરું પાડે છે. સબ્સિડી: પ્રમાણિત બિયારણ પર ₹1,000 પ્રતિ ક્વિન્ટલ સુધી. સૌરાષ્ટ્ર પ્રદેશના ખેડૂતોને (રાજકોટ, જૂનાગઢ, અમરેલી, ભાવનગર જિલ્લા) પ્રાથમિકતા આપવામાં આવે છે. iKhedut પોર્ટલ દ્વારા એપ્રિલ થી જૂન સુધી અરજી.

title: Cotton Seed Subsidy (Bt Cotton) — Gujarat
content: Gujarat provides subsidy on certified Bt cotton seed for Kharif season. Approved varieties at subsidised rates from government seed corporations. Eligible farmers: all landholding farmers in Gujarat. Key cotton districts: Rajkot, Surendranagar, Morbi, Sabarkantha, Vadodara, Bharuch. Register on iKhedut portal from March. Bring 7/12 record to nearest Agriculture office.
content_gu: ગુજરાત ખરીફ સિઝન માટે પ્રમાણિત Bt કપાસ બિયારણ પર સબ્સિડી આપે છે. સરકારી બિયારણ નિગમ તરફથી સ્વીકૃત જાતો સબ્સિડી દરે ઉપલબ્ધ. પાત્ર ખેડૂતો: ગુજરાતના તમામ જમીન ધારક ખેડૂતો. મુખ્ય કપાસ જિલ્લા: રાજકોટ, સુરેન્દ્રનગર, મોરબી, સાબરકાંઠા, વડોદરા, ભરૂચ. iKhedut પોર્ટલ પર માર્ચ થી નોંધણી.

title: Kisan Credit Card (KCC) — Gujarat Implementation
content: Kisan Credit Card provides short-term credit to farmers for crop production. In Gujarat, KCC is available at all nationalised banks, cooperative banks, and Regional Rural Banks. Credit limit: up to ₹3 lakh at 4% interest rate (7% with 3% government interest subvention). Eligibility: All farmers owning/leasing agricultural land. Required: 7/12 extract, photo ID, Aadhar. No collateral required up to ₹1.6 lakh. Gujarat cooperative banks provide additional crop loans.
content_gu: કિસાન ક્રેડિટ કાર્ડ ખેડૂતોને પાક ઉત્પાદન માટે ટૂંકા ગાળાની ક્રેડિટ આપે છે. ગુજરાતમાં KCC તમામ રાષ્ટ્રીયકૃત બેંકો, સહકારી બેંકો અને પ્રાદેશિક ગ્રામીણ બેંકોમાં ઉપલબ્ધ છે. ક્રેડિટ મર્યાદા: 4% વ્યાજ દરે ₹3 લાખ સુધી. પ્રવેશ: કૃષિ જમીન ધરાવતા/ભાડે લેતા તમામ ખેડૂતો. ₹1.6 લાખ સુધી કોઈ ગેરંટી નહીં.

title: PM Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY) — Gujarat
content: PMFBY provides crop insurance to Gujarat farmers. Premium: 2% for Kharif crops (cotton, groundnut, bajra, castor), 1.5% for Rabi crops (wheat, cumin, fennel, mustard). Government pays remaining premium. Claim paid if crop loss exceeds 25% threshold. Enroll through banks, CSC centres, or pmfby.gov.in. Deadline: 31 July for Kharif, 31 December for Rabi. Gujarat helpline: 1800-200-7710.
content_gu: PMFBY ગુજરાતના ખેડૂતોને પાક વીમો આપે છે. પ્રીમિયમ: ખરીફ પાક (કપાસ, મગફળી, બાજરો, દિવેલ) માટે 2%, રવિ પાક (ઘઉં, જીરું, વરિયાળી, રાઈ) માટે 1.5%. બાકી પ્રીમિયમ સરકાર ચૂકવે છે. 25% ઉપરના પાક નુકસાન પર દાવો ચૂકવાય. બેંકો, CSC કેન્દ્રો, અથવા pmfby.gov.in દ્વારા નોંધણી. ખરીફ માટે 31 જુલાઈ, રવિ માટે 31 ડિસેમ્બર સુધી. ગુજરાત હેલ્પલાઇન: 1800-200-7710.

title: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi — Gujarat Implementation
content: PM-KISAN provides ₹6,000 per year to eligible farmer families in three installments of ₹2,000 each (April–July, August–November, December–March). In Gujarat, over 53 lakh farmers are registered. To check status: pmkisan.gov.in or call 155261 / 011-24300606. Register at nearest CSC centre with Aadhar, bank account, and land records (7/12). Any Gujarat farmer with less than 2 hectares qualifies as small/marginal.
content_gu: PM-KISAN ₹2,000 ના ત્રણ હપ્તામાં (એપ્રિલ-જુલાઈ, ઓગસ્ટ-નવેમ્બર, ડિસેમ્બર-માર્ચ) પ્રતિ વર્ષ ₹6,000 આપે છે. ગુજરાતમાં 53 લાખ ઉપર ખેડૂતો નોંધાયેલ. સ્ટેટસ ચેક: pmkisan.gov.in અથવા 155261 / 011-24300606. નજીકના CSC કેન્દ્ર ખાતે આધાર, બેંક ખાતા, 7/12 સાથે નોંધણી. 2 હેક્ટર ઓછી જમીન ધરાવતા ગુજરાત ખેડૂત નાના/સીમાંત ગણાય.

title: Narmada Canal Irrigation Scheme — Gujarat
content: Gujarat's Sardar Sarovar Narmada project provides canal irrigation to farmers in 15 districts. Farmers in command area can apply for water connection through GWSSB (Gujarat Water Supply and Sewerage Board). Water tariff: ₹450 per hectare per season for food crops. Priority given to Saurashtra and North Gujarat where water scarcity is high. Apply at district GWSSB office. Helpline: 1800-233-0009.
content_gu: ગુજરાતના સરદાર સરોવર નર્મદા પ્રોજેક્ટ 15 જિલ્લામાં ખેડૂતોને નહેર સિંચાઈ આપે છે. કમાન્ડ વિસ્તારના ખેડૂતો GWSSB દ્વારા પાણી જોડાણ માટે અરજી કરી શકે. પાણી ટેરિફ: ખાદ્ય પાક માટે ₹450 પ્રતિ હેક્ટર પ્રતિ સિઝન. સૌરાષ્ટ્ર અને ઉત્તર ગુજરાતને પ્રાધાન્ય. GWSSB જિલ્લા કચેરીમાં અરજી. હેલ્પલાઇન: 1800-233-0009.

title: Krishi Mahotsav — Gujarat Agriculture Awareness Program
content: Krishi Mahotsav is Gujarat government's flagship agricultural awareness program held every year from May to June. Agriculture teams visit every village, provide soil health card, free seed mini-kits, and information on government schemes. In 2024, over 5,000 villages covered across all 33 districts. Farmers can get free consultation from agriculture experts during this period.
content_gu: કૃષિ મહોત્સવ ગુજરાત સરકારનો ફ્લેગશિપ કૃષિ જાગૃતિ કાર્યક્રમ છે જે દર વર્ષે મે-જૂનમાં યોજાય છે. કૃષિ ટીમ દરેક ગામ ખાતે મળે છે, સોઇલ હેલ્થ કાર્ડ, ફ્રી સીડ મિની-કિટ, અને સરકારી યોજનાઓ અંગે માહિતી આપે છે. 2024માં 33 જિલ્લાઓ ભર 5,000+ ગામ આવરી લેવાયા.

title: Mukhyamantri Kisan Sahay Yojana — Gujarat
content: Gujarat state scheme providing financial assistance to farmers who suffer crop loss due to unseasonal rain, flood, or drought. Compensation: ₹20,000 per hectare for 33–60% crop loss; ₹25,000 per hectare for over 60% crop loss (max 4 hectares). No premium required from farmer. Automatic enrollment based on revenue records. Administered by Gujarat Revenue Department.
content_gu: ગુજરાત રાજ્ય યોજના અવ-કાળ વરસાદ, પૂર, અથવા દુષ્કાળ કારણે પાક નુકસાન ભોગવેલ ખેડૂતોને નાણાકીય સહાય આપે છે. વળતર: 33–60% પાક નુકસાન માટે ₹20,000 પ્રતિ હેક્ટર; 60% ઉપર નુકસાન માટે ₹25,000 પ્રતિ હેક્ટર (મહત્તમ 4 હેક્ટર). ખેડૂત પાસેથી કોઈ પ્રીમિયમ નહીં. મહેસૂલ રેકોર્ડ આધારિત સ્વચાલિત નોંધણી.

title: Power Tariff Subsidy for Agricultural Pumps — Gujarat
content: Gujarat provides agricultural pump connections at subsidised electricity tariff. Flat rate: ₹1 per unit for small/marginal farmers. Standard agricultural tariff: ₹1.80 per unit. 8-hour supply guaranteed during day/night (Jyotigram Yojana). Apply at DGVCL/MGVCL/PGVCL/UGVCL electricity board office with 7/12 land record and pump specification.
content_gu: ગુજરાત ખેતી પંપ જોડાણ સ્વીકૃત વીજ ટેરિફ પર આપે છે. ફ્લેટ રેટ: નાના/સીમાંત ખેડૂત માટે ₹1 પ્રતિ યુનિટ. સ્ટાન્ડર્ડ ખેતી ટેરિફ: ₹1.80 પ્રતિ યુનિટ. જ્યોતિગ્રામ યોજના હેઠળ 8 કલાક વીજ પુરવઠો. 7/12 અને પંપ સ્પેસિફિકેશન સાથે DGVCL/MGVCL/PGVCL/UGVCL ઇલેક્ટ્રિસિટી ઓફિસ ખાતે અરજી.

title: Cumin and Fennel Seed Subsidy — Unjha Mandi Scheme
content: North Gujarat farmers growing cumin (jeera) and fennel (variyali) can get certified seed at subsidised rate from Unjha APMC (Asia's largest cumin and fennel trading market). Subsidy: ₹500–₹800 per kg on certified seed varieties. Banaskantha and Patan district farmers have priority. Registration through iKhedut. Unjha mandi contact: 02767-252001.
content_gu: ઉત્તર ગુજરાતના ખેડૂતો જીરું અને વરિયાળી ઉગાડે છે તેઓ ઉંઝા APMC (એશિયાની સૌથી મોટી જીરું-વરિયાળી બજાર) પ્રમાણિત બિયારણ સ્વીકૃત દરે મેળવી શકે. સબ્સિડી: ₹500–₹800 પ્રતિ કિ.ગ્રા. બનાસકાંઠા અને પાટણ જિલ્લાના ખેડૂતોને પ્રાધાન્ય. iKhedut દ્વારા નોંધણી. ઉંઝા મંડી સંપર્ક: 02767-252001.

title: Banana Growers Scheme — South Gujarat
content: South Gujarat farmers (Surat, Navsari, Valsad) growing banana get support under horticulture development scheme. Subsidy on tissue culture banana plants: ₹4,200 per acre. Support for drip installation: ₹15,000 per acre. Banana is a 12-month crop with high water requirement. Tissue culture Grandnaine variety recommended. Apply through horticulture department or iKhedut.
content_gu: દક્ષિણ ગુજરાત ખેડૂતો (સુરત, નવસારી, વલ્સાડ) કેળ ઉગાડે છે તેઓ બાગાયત વિકાસ યોજના હેઠળ સ્વીકૃત. ટિશ્યૂ કલ્ચર કેળ છોડ: ₹4,200 પ્રતિ એકર. ટપક સ્થાપન: ₹15,000 પ્રતિ એકર. કેળ 12 માસ પાક છે, ઊંચી પાણીની જરૂરિયાત. ટિશ્યૂ કલ્ચર ગ્રાન્ડ નૈઈન વિવિધ ભલામણ. iKhedut દ્વારા અરજી.

title: Castor Seed Distribution — Gujarat
content: Gujarat is India's largest castor (erandi/diveli) producer. Department of Agriculture provides GCH-4 and DCH-177 hybrid castor seed at subsidised rates. Subsidy: ₹1,200 per packet (4 kg). Priority districts: Mehsana, Banaskantha, Patan, Sabarkantha. Saurashtra farmers also growing castor as alternate kharif crop. Apply via iKhedut from May–June.
content_gu: ગુજરાત ભારતનું સૌથી મોટું દિવેલ ઉત્પાદક. કૃષિ વિભાગ GCH-4 અને DCH-177 સ્વીકૃત દ્વિસ્તરીય દિવેલ બિયારણ આપે છે. સબ્સિડી: ₹1,200 પ્રતિ પેકેટ (4 કિ.ગ્રા.). પ્રાધાન્ય જિલ્લા: મહેસાણા, બનાસકાંઠા, પાટણ, સાબરકાંઠા. iKhedut દ્વારા મે-જૂનમાં અરજી.

title: Agri Infrastructure Fund — Gujarat (AIF)
content: Agriculture Infrastructure Fund (AIF) provides medium-long term debt financing facility for post-harvest management and farm-level infrastructure. Interest subvention: 3% per annum, maximum loan ₹2 crore per project. Applicable for cold storage, primary processing, warehousing, sorting and grading units. Gujarat farmers can apply through banks. Portal: agriinfra.dac.gov.in.
content_gu: એગ્રી ઇન્ફ્રાસ્ટ્રક્ચર ફંડ (AIF) ૨ % ± 3% ‍ સ્ક્રેપ‍ post-harvest management અને ફાર્મ-સ્તરીય ઇન્ફ્રાસ્ટ્રક્ચર માટે ∘ ₹2 crore સ‌ ∘ agriinfra.dac.gov.in.

title: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchai Yojana — Gujarat
content: PMKSY promotes 'Har Khet Ko Pani, Har Drop More Crop'. In Gujarat, focuses on expanding micro-irrigation (drip and sprinkler) coverage. Gujarat state subsidy stacked with PMKSY: total up to 85% subsidy for small/marginal farmers. Implemented by Gujarat Green Revolution Company (GGRC). Apply at GGRC district offices or iKhedut portal.
content_gu: PMKSY 'હર ખેત કો પાણી, હર ડ્રૉપ મોર ક્રૉપ' ને પ્રોત્સાહ આપે છે. ગુજરાતમાં, ટૂ-ઝ, સ્પ્રિંક્લ‌ ∘ ∘ Gujarat Green Revolution Company (GGRC) ∘ iKhedut.

title: Atma Nirbhar Gujarat — Agricultural Input Subsidy
content: Under Atma Nirbhar Gujarat Sahay Package (2020-onwards), agricultural input assistance of ₹13,500 per hectare for irrigated crops and ₹6,800 per hectare for rain-fed crops is provided after natural disasters. Maximum assistance: ₹68,000 per farmer family. Assessment done by revenue department. Eligible for farmers losing crops due to flood, drought, unseasonal rain.
content_gu: આત્મ નિર્ભર ગુજરાત સહ‌ Package (2020 onwards) ∘ ₹13,500 per ha ∘ irrigated crops; ₹6,800 per ha ∘ rain-fed crops ∘ natural disaster ∘ max ₹68,000 per farmer family. Revenue department assessment.

title: e-NAM (National Agriculture Market) — Gujarat Mandis
content: Gujarat has 80+ mandis integrated with e-NAM platform for online trading. Farmers can sell produce electronically without being physically present. Integrated mandis include Rajkot, Ahmedabad, Surat, Junagadh, Anand, Gondal. Farmers need: Aadhar-linked bank account, mobile number registration at mandi. Benefits: transparent pricing, instant payment. Contact: enam.gov.in or 1800-270-0224.
content_gu: ગુજરાત ∘ 80+ ∘ e-NAM platform ∘. ∘ Rajkot, Ahmedabad, Surat, Junagadh, Anand, Gondal ∘. ∘ Aadhar-linked bank account, mandi ∘ mobile ∘. ∘ enam.gov.in ∘ 1800-270-0224.

title: Gujarat Agricultural University (GAU) Extension Services
content: Gujarat Agricultural University provides free extension services to farmers. KVK (Krishi Vigyan Kendras) in each district provide soil testing, demo plots, and training. GAU covers groundnut, cotton, castor research specifically for Gujarat climate. Contact: GAU Junagadh 0285-2672068. Website: www.jau.in
content_gu: ગુજરાત એગ્રીકલ્ચરલ યુનિવર્સિટી ખેડૂતોને મફત વિસ્તરણ સેવાઓ આપે છે. દરેક જિલ્લામાં KVK (કૃષિ વિજ્ઞાન કેન્દ્ર) જમીન પરીક્ષણ, ડેમો પ્લોટ, અને તાલીમ આપે છે. GAU ગુજરાત ક્લાઇમેટ માટે ખાસ મગફળી, કપાસ, દિવેલ સંશોધન. સંપર્ક: JAU જૂનાગઢ 0285-2672068.

title: Gujarat Cooperative Milk Marketing Federation (AMUL) Farmer Support
content: AMUL provides milk procurement support to dairy farmers in Gujarat. Average procurement price: ₹40-55 per litre depending on fat content. Farmers can register at nearest dairy cooperative. AMUL also provides cattle insurance, veterinary services, and fodder seeds. Contact GCMMF: 02692-258506.

title: Tikka Leaf Spot — Groundnut (Gujarat)
content: Tikka Leaf Spot in Groundnut (મગફળી): Symptoms: Dark brown circular spots on leaves with yellow halo. Causes premature leaf fall and reduced pod yield. Common in Gujarat's Saurashtra region during August–September. Treatment: Spray Mancozeb 75 WP @ 2.5 g/litre OR Chlorothalonil 75 WP @ 2 g/litre. Repeat every 10–14 days. Use disease-resistant varieties like GG-20, TG-37A. Avoid waterlogging.
content_gu: મગફળી ∘ ટિક્કા રોગ (પર્ણ ડાઘ): લક્ષણ: Dark brown circular spots on leaves with yellow halo. Causes premature leaf fall and reduced pod yie... ઉપચાર: Spray Mancozeb 75 WP @ 2.5 g/litre OR Chlorothalonil 75 WP @ 2 g/litre. Repeat every 10–14 days. Use...

title: Stem Rot (White Mold) — Groundnut (Gujarat)
content: Stem Rot (White Mold) in Groundnut (મગફળી): Symptoms: White cottony mycelium at base of plant. Wilting and rotting of stem at soil level. Sclerotia (black hard bodies) visible. Peak in humid conditions of September. Treatment: Drench soil with Carbendazim 50 WP @ 1 g/litre. Apply Trichoderma viride @ 4 g/kg seed as bio-control. Ensure proper field drainage. Crop rotation with cereals.

title: Collar Rot — Groundnut (Gujarat)
content: Collar Rot in Groundnut (મગફળી): Symptoms: Rotting of stem at ground level. Seedling wilting and death. Brown discoloration at collar region. Common in Gujarat during heavy rain periods. Treatment: Seed treatment with Thiram 75 WP @ 3 g/kg or Carbendazim 50 WP @ 2 g/kg. Avoid waterlogging. Remove and burn infected plants. Apply Bavistin drench.

title: Bud Necrosis Virus — Groundnut (Gujarat)
content: Bud Necrosis Virus in Groundnut (મગફળી): Symptoms: Growing tip turns necrotic (dead). Stunted plant growth. Leaflet chlorosis and mosaic pattern. Spread by thrips insect. Common in Gujarat summer groundnut crop. Treatment: Control thrips with Imidacloprid 70 WS @ 7 g/kg as seed treatment. Spray Dimethoate 30 EC @ 2 ml/litre. Remove infected plants immediately. Avoid late sowing.

title: Pink Bollworm — Cotton (Gujarat)
content: Pink Bollworm in Cotton (કપાસ): Symptoms: Larvae bore into flower buds (squares), flowers and bolls. Causes 'rosetted flowers' (blocked opening). Boll damage reduces seed cotton yield by 30-60%. Major pest in Gujarat cotton belt (Rajkot, Surendranagar, Morbi). Treatment: Use Bt cotton varieties (BGII). Apply pheromone traps (8/acre) for monitoring. Spray Emamectin Benzoate 5% SG @ 0.4 g/litre or Chlorantraniliprole 18.5% SC @ 0.4 ml/litre. Use light traps. Avoid ratoon cotton.

title: American Bollworm (Helicoverpa) — Cotton (Gujarat)
content: American Bollworm (Helicoverpa) in Cotton (કપાસ): Symptoms: Larvae attack cotton squares, flowers and bolls. Greenish caterpillar with pale lateral stripes. Causes boll shedding and reduced yield. Common June–October in Gujarat. Treatment: Apply NPV (Nuclear Polyhedrosis Virus) @ 250 LE/ha as biocontrol. Spray Spinosad 45 SC @ 0.3 ml/litre or Indoxacarb 15.8 EC @ 1 ml/litre. Pheromone traps. Avoid broad-spectrum insecticides early.

title: Whitefly and Leaf Curl Virus — Cotton (Gujarat)
content: Whitefly and Leaf Curl Virus in Cotton (કપાસ): Symptoms: Whitefly (Bemisia tabaci) transmits Cotton Leaf Curl Virus (CLCuV). Symptoms: Upward leaf curling, thickened veins, small leaves, stunted growth. Major problem in North Gujarat (Sabarkantha, Banaskantha) and Saurashtra. Treatment: Use tolerant varieties (NHH-44, Bunny-BG). Spray Triazophos 40 EC @ 2 ml/litre or Thiamethoxam 25 WG @ 0.3 g/litre. Remove infected plants early. Reflective mulch deters whitefly. Avoid excess nitrogen.

title: Grey Mildew (Ramularia leaf spot) — Cotton (Gujarat)
content: Grey Mildew (Ramularia leaf spot) in Cotton (કપાસ): Symptoms: Small white powdery spots on lower leaf surface. Angular brown spots on upper surface. Premature leaf fall. Common in September–November in humid conditions of South Gujarat. Treatment: Spray Carbendazim 50 WP @ 1 g/litre or Difenoconazole 25 EC @ 0.5 ml/litre. Improve canopy air circulation. Avoid overhead irrigation. Remove crop debris after harvest.

title: Castor Semilooper (Achaea janata) — Castor (Gujarat)
content: Castor Semilooper (Achaea janata) in Castor (દિવેલ): Symptoms: Green/brown caterpillar feeds on castor leaves voraciously. Defoliates entire plant. Major outbreak possible in July–September. Common across Gujarat castor belt (Mehsana, Banaskantha). Treatment: Spray Quinalphos 25 EC @ 2 ml/litre OR Chlorpyriphos 20 EC @ 2 ml/litre. Apply in early morning or evening. Hand-pick larvae. NPV bio-pesticide effective. Monitor from 45 days after sowing.

title: Castor Capsule Borer — Castor (Gujarat)
content: Castor Capsule Borer in Castor (દિવેલ): Symptoms: Larvae bore into castor spikes and capsules. Causes heavy seed loss. Pink-red caterpillar 25mm long. Affected capsules fail to develop seed. Treatment: Spray Carbaryl 50 WP @ 3 g/litre or Endosulfan 35 EC @ 2 ml/litre at early spike stage. Collect and destroy fallen capsules. Use light traps.

title: Cumin Blight (Alternaria) — Cumin (Gujarat)
content: Cumin Blight (Alternaria) in Cumin (જીરું): Symptoms: Water-soaked spots on leaves, stems, umbels. Dark brown necrotic patches. Complete umbel blight causing 100% yield loss. Major disease in Banaskantha, Patan districts. Worst in foggy/cold winter conditions. Treatment: Spray Mancozeb 75 WP @ 2.5 g/litre at first symptom. Repeat every 7–10 days. Use disease-free certified seed. Seed treatment with Thiram + Carbendazim. Avoid late sowing (after December 15).

title: Powdery Mildew of Cumin — Cumin (Gujarat)
content: Powdery Mildew of Cumin in Cumin (જીરું): Symptoms: White powdery coating on leaves, stems, and umbels. Severe infection causes yellowing and falling of leaves. Reduces cumin seed quality and yield. Common in dry warm weather of March–April in North Gujarat. Treatment: Spray Wettable Sulphur 80 WP @ 3 g/litre or Karathane (Dinocap) 0.05%. Apply before full disease establishment. Kalthane dust 25 kg/ha as alternate. Avoid late sowing.

title: Powdery Mildew of Fennel — Fennel (Gujarat)
content: Powdery Mildew of Fennel in Fennel (વરિયાળી): Symptoms: White powdery fungal growth on leaf surface. Leaf curling and deformation. Seed quality and yield reduced. Common in Mehsana, Patan districts during February–March. Treatment: Spray Wettable Sulphur 80 WP @ 3 g/litre. Apply Difenoconazole 25 EC @ 0.5 ml/litre at severe infection. Improve plant spacing for air circulation. Use resistant varieties.

title: Panama Wilt (Fusarium wilt) — Banana (Gujarat)
content: Panama Wilt (Fusarium wilt) in Banana (કેળ): Symptoms: Yellowing of lower leaves progressing upward. Pseudostem splits at base. Brown-red discoloration of vascular bundles inside. Complete plant death. Soil-borne disease spreading through infected suckers. Major threat to South Gujarat (Surat, Navsari, Bharuch) banana growers. Treatment: Use Tissue Culture (TC) banana plants (disease-free). Drench Carbendazim 50 WP @ 1 g/litre around root zone. Apply Trichoderma viride bio-agent. Avoid infected sucker planting. Destroy affected plants. Crop rotation for 3-4 years.

title: Bajra Downy Mildew (Green Ear Disease) — Bajra (Gujarat)
content: Bajra Downy Mildew (Green Ear Disease) in Bajra (બાજરો): Symptoms: Affected leaves show white downy growth on underside. Leaf yellowing, ear head malformation (green ear — leaves instead of grain). Up to 40% yield loss. Common in Saurashtra and North Gujarat August–September. Treatment: Seed treatment with Metalaxyl 35 SD @ 6 g/kg. Use downy mildew resistant hybrids (GHB-558, GHB-538). Remove infected plants at first sign. Avoid monoculture.

title: Yellow Rust (Stripe Rust) — Wheat (Gujarat)
content: Yellow Rust (Stripe Rust) in Wheat (ઘઉં): Symptoms: Yellow-orange stripes of pustules running parallel along leaves. Severe infection causes complete leaf necrosis. Major yield threat in central and North Gujarat wheat (November–February). Spreads rapidly in cool humid conditions. Treatment: Spray Propiconazole 25 EC @ 0.1% (1 ml/litre) at first symptom appearance. Tebuconazole 250 EC @ 0.1% as alternate. Grow resistant varieties: HD-2781, GW-496, NW-1014. Spray preventively if disease in neighboring fields.

title: Onion Purple Blotch (Alternaria porri) — Onion (Gujarat)
content: Onion Purple Blotch (Alternaria porri) in Onion (ડુંગળી): Symptoms: Purple-brown oval lesions with yellow margins on leaves. White centre surrounded by purple border. Severe infections kill leaf tips. Common in Bhavnagar, Rajkot, Kheda districts. Treatment: Spray Mancozeb 75 WP @ 2.5 g/litre + Iprodione 50 WP @ 1 g/litre. Reduce overhead irrigation. Apply copper oxychloride 50 WP @ 3 g/litre. Remove infected leaves and destroy.

title: Potato Late Blight (Phytophthora infestans) — Potato (Gujarat)
content: Potato Late Blight (Phytophthora infestans) in Potato (બટ‌): Symptoms: Water-soaked dark spots on leaves expanding rapidly with white mycelium on leaf underside. Stem infection causes blackening. Complete crop destruction possible within a week under cool humid conditions. Common in Anand, Vadodara, Sabarkantha (November–January). Treatment: Spray Mancozeb 75 WP @ 2.5 g/litre preventively. Cymoxanil + Mancozeb @ 3 g/litre at first symptom. Metalaxyl M 8% + Mancozeb 64% @ 2.5 g/litre for systemic action. Avoid overhead irrigation. Use certified seed tubers.

title: Sesame Phyllody Disease — Sesame (Gujarat)
content: Sesame Phyllody Disease in Sesame (તલ): Symptoms: Flower parts converted into leaf-like structures. Phyllody (leaf-like sepals). No seed formation. Caused by phytoplasma, spread by leaf hoppers. Common in late-sown sesame in Gujarat summer crop. Treatment: No chemical cure once infected. Control vector (leafhopper) with Dimethoate 30 EC @ 2 ml/litre. Use resistant varieties. Rogue out and destroy infected plants. Early sowing reduces infection.

title: Mango Malformation — Mango (Gujarat)
content: Mango Malformation in Mango (કેરી): Symptoms: Vegetative malformation: bunchy top, small leaves, no flower. Floral malformation: distorted flower panicles, no fruit set. Caused by Fusarium subglutinans. Common in South Gujarat mango orchards (Surat, Navsari, Valsad). Treatment: Prune malformed parts 15–30 cm below infection during October–November. Apply NAA (naphthalene acetic acid) 200 ppm spray in October. Spray Carbendazim 0.1% on cut surface. Remove and burn pruned material.

title: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi — Gujarat
content: PM-KISAN provides ₹6,000 per year in 3 installments of ₹2,000 each to all farmer families. In Gujarat, 53+ lakh farmers registered (as of 2024). Payment schedule: April–July (1st), August–November (2nd), December–March (3rd). Status check: pmkisan.gov.in → 'Beneficiary Status' → Enter Aadhar/Account/Mobile. Gujarat helpline: 155261 or 011-24300606. Registration: Nearest CSC centre with Aadhar, 7/12, bank passbook. Common issues: Wrong Aadhar-bank link, land record mismatch — contact local Talati.

title: PM Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY) — Gujarat Kharif
content: PMFBY crop insurance for Gujarat Kharif season (cotton, groundnut, bajra, castor, sesame, rice). Farmer premium: 2% of sum insured for Kharif crops. Government pays remaining premium (typically 80-90% of actuarial premium). Claim triggered when district-level crop yield falls below threshold yield (average of past 7 years). Enroll by 31 July for Kharif. Apply at bank, CSC, or pmfby.gov.in. Gujarat Helpline: 1800-200-7710. Kharif 2024: Major crops covered — Cotton (₹50,000/ha insured amount), Groundnut (₹40,000/ha).

title: PM Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY) — Gujarat Rabi
content: PMFBY for Gujarat Rabi crops (wheat, cumin, fennel, mustard, chickpea, garlic). Farmer premium: 1.5% for Rabi food crops. Enroll by 31 December for Rabi. Wheat coverage: ₹35,000/ha insured amount in Gujarat. Cumin coverage: ₹60,000/ha insured amount (high-value crop). Loss assessment: remote sensing + crop cutting experiments (CCE). Gujarat Helpline: 1800-200-7710.

title: Kisan Credit Card (KCC) — Gujarat Banks
content: KCC provides revolving credit to farmers for agricultural inputs. Interest rate: 7% per annum; government subvention of 3% makes effective rate 4% for timely repayment. Credit limit set based on cultivated area and crop type. Gujarat banks offering KCC: Bank of Baroda, SBI, Central Bank, DCCB (District Cooperative Banks). Minimum documents: Application form, 7/12 land record, Aadhar, 2 photos, bank account. No collateral up to ₹1.6 lakh. KCC also covers working capital for allied activities. Apply at nearest bank branch. Gujarat cooperative banks: 02692-230031.

title: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Maan-Dhan Yojana (PM-KMY) — Pension for Gujarat Farmers
content: PM-KMY provides monthly pension of ₹3,000 to small/marginal farmers after age 60. Eligible: Farmers aged 18–40 years with less than 2 hectares land. Contribution: ₹55–₹200/month depending on entry age (government matches contribution). In Gujarat, register at CSC centres or Gram Panchayat with Aadhar and bank account. Administered by Life Insurance Corporation (LIC). Helpline: 1800-267-6888.
content_gu: PM-KMY ∘ ₹3,000 ∘ month ∘ pension ∘ 60 ∘ ∘ age ∘ ∘. 2 ∘ hectare ∘ ∘ ∘ ∘ 18–40 ∘ ∘. ∘ ₹55–₹200 ∘ month ∘ ∘. Gujarat ∘ CSC ∘ Gram Panchayat ∘ Aadhar ∘ ∘ 1800-267-6888.
